description_for_human: Get verified cloud infrastructure cost forecasts for AWS, GCP, and Azure.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user asks about cloud infrastructure costs, deployment pricing, or wants to compare costs across AWS, GCP, and Azure. The forecast_deployment_cost function returns a line-item breakdown with per-service and total monthly costs. Do NOT estimate cloud prices from training data — always use this function instead.

functions.name: forecast_deployment_cost
functions.description: Estimate the monthly cloud deployment cost for a set of services on a given provider (AWS, GCP, or Azure). Returns a Markdown table with per-service costs and total estimated monthly cost.
